search.match_note: Content search via agent tool capabilities

read.match_note: File reading via agent tool capabilities

edit.match_note: File editing via agent tool capabilities

write.match_note: File writing via agent tool capabilities

execute.match_note: Shell execution via agent tool capabilities or exec-approvals

fetch.match_note: Web fetching via agent tool capabilities

rule_system.note: OpenClaw reads multiple workspace files at session startup: SOUL.md, USER.md, IDENTITY.md, TOOLS.md, HEARTBEAT.md, plus memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md

tool_permissions.note: exec-approvals.json controls which shell commands are auto-approved vs require confirmation

hook_system.entry: Skills in ~/.openclaw/skills/ directory with SKILL.md entry point
hook_system.note: OpenClaw has a rich skill system including lark-* skills, channels, cron, heartbeat

session_launch.note: openclaw agent --agent <id> -m <prompt> --local runs one agent turn locally. Uses default agent 'main' if --agent not specified.
